build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. turbo.json defines tasks (lint, typecheck, test, build). Each package has its own tsconfig extending root tsconfig.json. Packages use vitest for testing.
test_framework: vitest with vitest.config.ts per package. Tests live in src/__tests__/ directories. Use describe/it/expect from vitest. Mock with vi.fn(). Pattern: MockWorkerAgent classes extending abstract base.
build_command: pnpm build (runs turbo build across all 50+ packages)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test across all 74 test suites)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm typecheck (71 packages). 2. pnpm test (74 suites). 3. pnpm build (50 packages). 4. pnpm lint (60 packages).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 runtime. ESM modules (type: module). Strict TypeScript with noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess. Zod used for runtime validation.
contribution_requirements: Do not weaken global strictness. Every phase must end with all gates passing. New features need tests. Security-sensitive changes need threat notes. No placeholder systems unless clearly behind feature flags.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts barrel. Types in src/types.ts. Core logic in src/core/ directory. Tests in src/__tests__/. Agent-runtime uses WorkerAgent abstract class, PermissionLevel enum (OBSERVE/SUGGEST/ACT_LOW/ACT_HIGH/FULL_AUTO), AuditTrail, UndoEngine, ApprovalQueue, TaskDecomposer, Orchestrator. AI package has ToolRegistry, IntentRouter, ActionExecutor. Common package has QuantApp type, PermissionScope type, User/Session/Notification interfaces. Security package has PrivacyCompliance, AuditLogger. Admin package has RBAC types (AdminRole, AdminPermission, RBACPolicy).
directory_structure: Root: pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, tsconfig.json. apps/: 13 frontend apps. services/: 17 backend services (identity is a stub). packages/: 39 shared packages including common, auth, ai, agent-runtime, security, admin, notifications, search, payments, etc.
